summary: Phase 11 extends the unpublished 0.1.0 line with Studio-driven SDK persistence helpers and deeper real-world compatibility evidence while keeping release publication deferred.

required_gates.purpose: Prevent backend-specific types and dependency boundary regressions.
Keep diagnostic catalog codes governed and deterministic.
Keep public JSON schemas versioned and valid.
Enforce workspace version, MSRV, changelog, and semver policy wiring.
Validate the release-facing real-world compatibility catalog.
Verify the high-level SDK facade, examples, and CLI summary surface.
Compose the Phase 7 release-hardening evidence gate.
Compose the Phase 8 SDK-readiness evidence gate.
Compose the Phase 9 CLI and SDK consumer-readiness evidence gate.
Compose the Phase 10 first-release readiness gate for 0.1.0.
Compose the Phase 11 SDK polish and compatibility-depth evidence gate.

deferred: Full Docker Compose bug compatibility is not claimed.
Full remote BuildKit, registry credential, and hosted sync workflows remain future release tracks.
Susun Studio integration feedback may still drive additional 0.1.0 API polish before publishing.
CLI end-user polish beyond stable summary and plan surfaces remains a later usability track.
